_meta.resume_note: Audited LTCC's year-pinned official 2025-2026 Programs and Associate Degrees for Transfer indexes. Economics exists only as a course department, not an award program.

none_found_sources.locator: Complete 2025-2026 Programs index; no Economics program appears
Complete 2025-2026 Associate Degrees for Transfer index; no Economics AA-T or AS-T appears
Economics department page lists only ECO 101 and ECO 102 course descriptions and no degree or program

notes: LTCC's catalog distinguishes award-bearing Program pages from course-only Department pages. Economics appears only in the course department, while the complete Programs and ADT indexes contain no Economics award. Business and Social Science awards remain out of scope.
